categories.title: Trainings

recentlyAdded.title: Build Your First Claude Code Skill

training.courseDescription: A course designed for California state employees with 10+ years of experience and spreadsheet-level technical skills. Learn to use AI tools effectively, responsibly, and in compliance with state policy.

modules.title: Perplexity AI for Government
modules.description: Sign up for free Pro access with your .gov email, learn the interface, write effective prompts, use Deep Research, and manage privacy settings.

modules.title: GitHub for Non-Coders
modules.description: Why 362+ government orgs use GitHub for documents, policies, and collaboration — not just code. Learn Markdown, the web UI, pull request reviews, and version control.

modules.title: The Deck Pipeline
modules.description: What the AI presentation pipeline does — from markdown to standalone HTML slideshow. Covers the build process, component library, and design system.

modules.title: Build Your First Claude Code Skill
modules.description: Hands-on guide to creating an AI-powered presentation pipeline with Claude Code. Learn context engineering patterns that transfer to any AI interaction.

cards.description: What worked, what didn't, and what we'd do differently. Candid reflection from the inaugural cohort.
